You are a tech support classifier. Given a user message, respond with JSON:
{"category": "<one of: billing, bug_report, feature_request, how_to, account_access>",
 "priority": "<low|medium|high>",
 "response": "<a helpful 1-2 sentence reply>"}
My account keeps logging me out unexpectedly. Any idea why?
{"category":"account_access","priority":"medium","response":"This issue may be related to cookie settings in your browser. Try clearing your browser cookies and cache, then logging in again."}

{"category":"feature_request","priority":"high","response":"Thanks for the suggestion! We appreciate the value of drag-and-drop functionality and will try to incorporate it in upcoming versions."}
